nasb.text: Then the cherub stretched out his hand from between the cherubim to the fire which was between the cherubim, took some and put it into the hands of the one clothed in linen, who took it and went out.

esv.text: And a cherub stretched out his hand from between the cherubim to the fire that was between the cherubim, and took some of it and put it into the hands of the man clothed in linen, who took it and went out.

cnv.text: 有一個基路伯從眾基路伯之間，伸手到他們中間的火那裡去，取了些火，放在那身穿細麻布衣服的人手中；那人拿了火，就出去了。

ccb.text: 有一个基路伯天使伸手到他们中间的火里，取了些火放在那人手里，那人就拿了出去。
